feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Maintenance Plan with Scheduling Indicator "Time-Key date" not getting scheduled in IP30H
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while scheduling of maintenance plans with IP30H.

Maintenance plans are not getting scheduled.

Maintenance plans having scheduling indicator is " Time-Key date".

Please help me out to get these maintenance plans scheduled with IP30H.

entry.title: SAP Hana public cloud any Standard permits are available or customized
asset inspection information use
entry.content:
hello,

i would like to know usage of "Asset Inspection Information Use" in equipment master.

entry.title: Strategy maintenance plan re-scheduling in multiple maintenance package scenario
entry.content:
Hello, 

If in preventive maintenance strategy plan has selected multiple different maintenance packages for example 1 year and 5 year.

And if there is only one time exception and need to postpone only that 1year maintenance package +6 month, in situation that order is not called. How to call and re-schedule that 1 year packet +6 month, but not make any changes for 5 year package and calls

What is the best model for preventive maintenance strategy plan and what options and best practicies there is? Multiple maintenance items?

entry.title: Higher priority work order reservation should not be able to access the stock allocated for such low
entry.content:
Hi Team,

when we have multiple Work orders, the highest priority work order will take away the stock from work order reservation with lowest priority.
As a result of this activity, when they do maintenance for low priority work orders, there is no stock available most times.

So, business has asked for a solution to make the reservation for such low priority as hard reservations. Meaning a higher priority work order reservation should not be able to access the stock allocated for such low priority order.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Maintenance Plan vs Item
entry.content: I have 20 pieces of identical equipment that share a task list with time based strategy. I made a maintenance plan that lists all 20 equipment in it's object list.  I need each object to have it's own monthlies staggered from each other, can I do that with ONE Maintenance Item, or do I need to make a maintenance item for EACH object/equipment? Please advise

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA: Configuration of Print Output for Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am currently working on configuring the print output for maintenance orders in SAP S/4HANA. So far, I have completed the following configurations:

1) Cros-Application Components -> Output Control -> Manage Application Object Type Activation

2) Cross-Application Components -> Output Control -> Output Type

3) Cross-Application Components -> Output Control -> Assign Output Channels

4) Maintenance and Service Processing -> Basic Settings- > Print Control -> Define Shop Papers, Forms and Output Programs

  • Define Shop Papers

  • Forms and Output Programs

When I try to execute the print output within the maintenance order, the system shows the interface attached.

I have also manually entered the required data, but the system still displays the errors shown in the figure.

What additional configurations are needed to ensure the print starts automatically without errors?

Thank you in advance for your help!

I have configurated the

entry.title: Consumption/Adjusting the usage Cycle to PRT in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,     

We need solution for below scenario in Public cloud.                                                                         The customer requires  PRT be utilize for 5 production cycles. After the 5th order, the PRT will go for Rework/Consumed and replaced with a new PRT for the 6th production cycle.                                          Is it OKAY to use Equipment PRT in this case??                                                                                   If Yes  For testing,  We have already created the Equipment PRT, along with a counter and a maintenance plan, and assigned it to the routing of the finished goods (FG) material. After confirming the production order, report is generating(Tcode- IK17) for the quantity of equipment consumed.            However, how can we get the report on basis of PRT used in No. of production orders and its restriction beyond 5th production order.

Is there any provision which suits better for above case except PRT                                       Please help

entry.title: "Display Planning List" button in WPS1 - What is the functionality?
entry.content: Can someone share any document regarding "Display Planning List" button in WPS1?

entry.title: PMIS - Planner group analysis additional input parameter
entry.content:
Hi 

Business wants to have additional input parameters in Transaction MCI4 - PMIS _ Planner group analysis app, 
Input parameters are Order type and user status. 

In some SAP notes observed PMIS -planner group analysis report going to update some of table. 

Please suggest on proceeding for enhancement on above parameter will have any impact with future table upgradation.
Also suggest will enhancement logic for input parameter will works for this report. 

Thanks and Regards

Jagadeesh

entry.title: IW37N how to generate a report with multiple Partner Function (vendor) entries?
entry.content:
I am trying to run an IW37N report that includes multiple Vendor numbers:

IW37N Partner Function

I seem to be only able to generate/search by one Vendor code at a time.

Any way to achieve this? Thanks.

entry.title: Goods Issue Movement Types different 961 and Z61 for different Order Types
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

My requirement is to have Z61 Movement type for reservation for goods issue for Work Order Type PM09 and 961 movement type for Work Order Type PM10 and rest all order types.

Regards

Prashant

entry.title: AC06 Service Master - "Changed On Date" incorrect to Created Date
entry.content:
We are getting many instances of the changed on date being years before the created date when listing service masters using AC06.

There are no functional specs that could be causing this, anyone any ideas?

entry.title: Hierarchical strategy plan maintenance packet call pause in multiple packet case
entry.content:
Hello,

If I have strategy based preventive maintenance plan which includes one maintenance item and which task list include multiple different selected maintenance packets (cycle/interval).

QUESTION: Can I pause and put on hold OIL CHANGE 3 WEE,  but still continue VISUAL INSPECTION 1 WEE packet to call order every  1 week?

1. VISUAL INSPECTION  1 WEE 

2. OIL CHANGE 3 WEE

entry.title: Equipment masterdata quick buttons
entry.content:
Is there a way to change the quick buttons marked in red?

My client is asking to delete all of them and add 'Maintenance history' quick button.

entry.title: Superior Functional Location
entry.content:
Hi All ,

Greetings !

How can I assign  sub-ordinate functional to superior functional location in mass . I am aware of doing one by one using t-code IL02 . But I have hundreds of functional locations which need to be assigned to their respective superior functional location . Can anyone please shed some light .

Thanking you in advance .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Enhancement in View profile
entry.content:
Plant Maintenance and Customer Service->Maintenance and Service Processing->Maintenance and Service Orders->Functions and Settings for Order Types->Basic Order View

How to check whether enhancement (like sub-screen, sub-tab, fields) can be done on view profile or NOT

entry.title: General Notification with Reference to Equipment / or better other Notification Type?
entry.content:
dear all,

in reference to this question:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-add-equipment-and-functional-fileds-in-general-notification-iqs21/qaq-p/9429283#feedback-error 

I have probably same requirement. The Business wants to manage the Process of purchasing/Leasing of Company Cars with Notifications and equipments, no Fleet Management so fair, just Basic Master Data in The Equipment Master and for beginning no maintenance/repair orders. The Notification should be used for mirroring the whole Process in different Stages. 

start of the Process is a requirement/allowance of having a Company car by a authorized Person. The Process ends when the car is Handed over to the new driver.

The Future driver of The car will ask for a Quote at a local dealer. The Person responsible for giving him Green light to take that Action should create an SAP Notification (General Notification Maybe) based on a Notification Template which already Contains some Tasks that are Linked with different Partners (Finance,purchase,HR). The tasks mirror the steps that Are necessary to complete the process. We want to use The Notification to Hand over The responsibilities During The process from One to The other. Each time a task is finished the responsible Person closes that task and in First step manually Starts the next task. With this we want to make visible where we are with a specific Notification (who is responsible and What are the Open tasks.)

in principle I would Like to use the General Notification Type but as fair as i found out,there is nomwas of linking an Equipment as Reference to that Notification? Can anyone confirm? This is because of the Notification category that determines the possible Screen areas of a Notification. Correct?

I would Like to link the Equipment, because in One specific Task of the Notification the Equipment Master has to be created and this would be the best time to link the Equipment to the Notification so we Can easily Identify the Status of One specific Company car procurement Process according to Equipment Master data e.g. Car Plate or Brand or driver and so on. With iw29. 

Any comments Are much appreciated,

feel free to ask for more Details,

 

Best regards

 

michael

entry.title: Required Enterprise Business Functions for S/4 HANA 2023 FPS2 PCE
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it mandatory that we must activate below business functions when migrating from EhP8 6.0 to S/4 HANA 2023 in SAP Enterprise Asset Management area?

At this moment not all Business Functions mentioned are active in ECC and we plan to move to S/4 HANA 2023.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4cef93946a0b48ec89533b3c34443b85/1655de4728664d1e9c99e9d3e67770a7.html

LOG_EAM_CI_1 to  LOG_EAM_CI_12
LOG_EAM_SIMPLICITY to LOG_EAM_SIMPLICITY_12
LOG_EAM_IME_1

Regards

Vineeth

entry.title: Suggestions on Updating Breakdown Notifications and Equipment Status
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am seeking your guidance regarding an issue we are currently facing. Our client requires daily updates of the breakdown status in the equipment user status. While the site team is already opening breakdown notifications, the client has proposed giving all end users access to IE02 for updating the user status daily.

However, granting end users this access could pose a significant risk, as it allows changes to the equipment master data. We currently have around 10 vehicles in breakdown status at a single site, and our organization operates approximately 35 sites.

From my understanding, daily updates to the user status are generally more applicable to production or manufacturing companies.

Could you please suggest the best procedure for updating breakdown notifications or equipment user status? Is providing IE02 access to all end users advisable, or is there an alternative, more secure approach we should consider?
